name: The Old Town Green
text:
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.
{2}, {T}: Create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token. Activate only if you control three or more other lands. (Plenty of room on the green for a rally.)
flavorText: Site of every town meeting, every potluck, every recall, and one regrettable hot-air-balloon festival nobody discusses.
